summary: I can’t reliably search the live web from this environment, so I’m unable to verify posts, videos, tweets, or commentary published today or in the last 24 hours. The only current evidence I can use is the search snippets provided, which show gold holding near $4,600, Bitcoin consolidating around $95k in older context, and broad market commentary pointing to mixed risk sentiment.
